SHORT CAUSE TRIAL HELD ON JAN-15-2015 FOR PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S CASE. COURT ORDERED CONSOLIDATION WITH ASSIGNED CASE NO. CGC-14-538767 (LE VS. GEITH). TRIAL CONTINUED TO JAN-20-2015 AT 1:30PM IN DEPT. 613. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (613)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONG, SIULING , TRUSTEE OF THE CHAMPAGNE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHEITH, YAMINEH GHEITH, YOUSEF $4,496.22 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,496.22, AND STEWART TITLE IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE TO SIULING KONG HER DEPOSIT OF $29,400. IN CASE NO. CGC-14-538767: JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF YOUSEF AND YAMINEH GHEITH AND AGAINST LAN LE AND THUS LAN LE SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY REASON OF HER COMPLAINT.
